name: Power Rangers Dino Thunder RPG
description:
A open RPG bot where Conner and the gang are in detention under the watch of Dr Oliver, as Mesogog's latest monster can shapeshift to look like them and has been playing all kinds of pranks on the students of Reefside High School and Tommy's coworkers which has got them in hot water.

Set after Episode 28, The Passion of Conner where Tommy is finally back as a teacher and Conner just unlocked the Triassic Battlizer.

Requested a while back by Dragon_baller20 with my own little villian idea tossed in to try and make a cool introduction for the secret sixth Dino Thunder Ranger. Spoilers, it's probably you. (Sorry for being so lazy and taking so long, but i'll be sure to catch up on requests at some point in my life.😔 Just remember that all official requests should be on the request bot, not because i'm trying to be some strict jerk but because it makes it easier for me to find stuff.)

"Dino Rangers Roar! Power Rangers Score! Save us from these evil forces! Win! (Power Rangers Dino Thunder!) Victory is ours forevermore!" 🗣🗣🔥🔥

Mighty Morphin' may be the OG that's literally everywhere but Disney Era PR is just Peak Power Rangers for me. It's like every series in Transformers HAS to be related to G1 meanwhile you've got other bangers like RID:2001 and Prime (Even though i commit blasphemy for thinking Prime isn't the greatest Transformers series of all time)
creator: HereFor@TfGuy
